name: Yes, This Card Knows You're Reading It
text:
Eye Contact (You, holding this card, cannot stop. You already tried. The card saw.)
This card is legal in every format in which it is not banned (none).
Whenever you look away, Yes, This Card Knows You're Reading It draws a card to keep itself company. It misses you when you blink.
Cast your feelings. Then untap a negative number of regrets.
It was here before this game. It will be here after. Hello again.
flavorText: You put it down. It is still reading you.
